title: E R C1155 Token
content:
- ### OntologyBlock
- ## About ERC-1155 Token
  - Enjin gaming items, The Sandbox assets

ontology.definition: A multi-token standard offering semi-fungibility where tokens represent classes of interchangeable assets. Bundles multiple assets (fungible and non-fungible) in one smart contract for efficient gas usage and reduced network congestion.
